archimate:Grouping.name: Semantic Governance content
archimate:Grouping.documentation:
Definition: Semantic Governance Content ABB is a Grouping of the concepts and terms to support the elaboration of rules and mechanisms to enhance the availability, integrity, interoperability and security of data while respecting data protection and ethical rules
Source: EUR-LEX
Source reference: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/PDF/?uri=CELEX:52020PC0767
LOST view: Semantic view
Viewpoint: Highlevel viewpoint
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SemanticGovernanceContentGrouping
ABB name: eira:SemanticGovernanceContentGrouping
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/SemanticGovernanceContentGrouping
Interoperability Layer: Semantic

properties.value: Semantic Governance Content ABB is a Grouping of the concepts and terms to support the elaboration of rules and mechanisms to enhance the availability, integrity, interoperability and security of data while respecting data protection and ethical rules
